mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(B.ID) FROM BOARD B INNER JOIN MEMBERS M ON B.EMAIL = M.EMAIL
WHERE M.EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE M.NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE B.SUBJECT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE B.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE B.SUBJECT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%' OR B.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT S.* , ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM (SELECT B.ID , B.SUBJECT , B.CONTENT , B.EMAIL , B.VIEW_CNT , TO_CHAR(B.CRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_DT , TO_CHAR(B.MDFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MDFY_DT , B.FILE_NAME , B.ORIGIN_FILE_NAME , M.NAME , M.REGIST_DATE FROM BOARD B INNER JOIN MEMBERS M ON B.EMAIL = M.EMAIL
WHERE M.EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE M.NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE B.SUBJECT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE B.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
WHERE B.SUBJECT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%' OR B.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword}|| '%'
ORDER BY B.ID DESC) S WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{pageNo} + 1) * #{listSize}) WHERE RNUM >= #{pageNo} * #{listSize} + 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BO-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_BOARD_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD (ID , SUBJECT , CONTENT , EMAIL , VIEW_CNT , CRT_DT , MDFY_DT , FILE_NAME , ORIGIN_FILE_NAME , FILE_GROUP_ID) VALUES (#{id} , #{subject} , #{content} , #{email} , 0 , SYSDATE , SYSDATE , NULL , NULL , #{fileGroupId})
mapper.select: SELECT B.ID , B.SUBJECT , B.CONTENT , B.EMAIL , B.VIEW_CNT , TO_CHAR(B.CRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_DT , TO_CHAR(B.MDFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MDFY_DT , B.FILE_NAME , B.ORIGIN_FILE_NAME , F.FILE_NUM , F.FILE_GROUP_ID , F.OBFUSCATE_NAME , F.DISPLAY_NAME , F.EXTEND_NAME , F.FILE_LENGTH , F.FILE_PATH , M.NAME , TO_CHAR(M.REGIST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGIST_DATE FROM BOARD B INNER JOIN MEMBERS M ON B.EMAIL = M.EMAIL LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT F.FILE_NUM , FG.FILE_GROUP_ID , F.OBFUSCATE_NAME , F.DISPLAY_NAME , F.EXTEND_NAME , F.FILE_LENGTH , F.FILE_PATH FROM FILES_GROUP FG INNER JOIN FILES F ON FG.FILE_GROUP_ID = F.FILE_GROUP_ID) F ON B.FILE_GROUP_ID = F.FILE_GROUP_ID WHERE B.ID = #{_parameter}
